stemHtml: Which flight profile corresponds to the highest cost index?

options.a: Climb TAS = 280 kts/Mach 0.78 - Cruise TAS = 350 kts/Mach 0.8 - Descent TAS = 280 kts/Mach 0.75
options.b: Climb TAS = 245 kts/Mach 0.74 - Cruise TAS = 260 kts/Mach 0.76 - Descent TAS = 245 kts/Mach 0.74
